overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from an open corporate plaza down into a covered pedestrian underpass, then emerges onto a busy street with elevated highways and commercial storefronts before entering a narrow alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with large digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open plaza toward a stairway entrance

entered.detail: large triple-screen digital billboard displaying advertisements on the glass tower facade
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and corporate branding
rectangular concrete planter containing spiky plants
tall modern street lamp with bright white light
low yellow concrete barrier walls lining the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide corporate plaza at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings covered in massive digital billboards. The camera moves forward past concrete planters and street lamps toward a stairway entrance, with yellow barrier walls visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway descent to covered pedestrian underpass

events.description: descending stairs from open plaza into covered underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a lower covered level

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered pedestrian walkway
metal handrail along the stair descent
small red and white utility structure at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a flight of stairs from the plaza into a dimly lit covered area. The open sky disappears behind concrete structures as the character moves into a sheltered underpass with utility buildings and stair railings visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food vendors

events.description: entering dimly lit covered walkway with neon accent lighting from stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market area passing food stalls and concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: person in red pants standing near a food stall

entered.detail: wooden food stall with warm lighting and menu displays
black and yellow striped concrete barriers lining the walkway
green neon sign for Lizzy's bar visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow covered walkway with a low concrete ceiling, passing food stalls on the left and striped barriers on the right. The area is dimly lit with mixed neon and warm artificial lighting. A person stands near one of the stalls as the camera moves toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highway overpass

events.description: exiting covered walkway back to open street level with visible overpass and traffic
cars driving along the street adjacent to the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy street with an elevated highway overhead

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving along the street

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway with vehicles passing overhead
tall palm tree visible against the night sky
large digital screen displaying an American flag pattern
large billboard with yellow neon text reading PURE OVERKILL

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway onto a wide urban street with an elevated highway overpass dominating the view. Palm trees line the sidewalk while cars drive along the road. Large digital billboards including one displaying an American flag and another advertising PURE OVERKILL illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon storefronts

events.description: turning corner into narrow alleyway with intense red and blue neon signage
dominant red neon lighting from building signage creates intense color cast

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley passing neon-lit bars and shops

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the alleyway

entered.detail: bar entrance with purple and teal neon lighting
vertical red neon sign running down the building facade
tall concrete wall with graffiti and neon reflections
red neon sign reading PREPAB CITY on the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow alleyway lined with concrete walls and intense neon signage. The camera passes by a bar with purple and teal lighting, then moves deeper into the alley where red neon signs including one for PREPAB CITY dominate the visual field. The environment feels enclosed and cyberpunk in aesthetic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, towering corporate plaza into the enclosed, neon-drenched depths of a futuristic city. It begins by moving past concrete planters and massive digital billboards toward a stairway, descending from the open night sky into a dimly lit, sheltered underpass. As the camera navigates this narrow covered walkway, passing food stalls and striped barriers under a low concrete ceiling, the space gradually opens back up upon emerging onto a wide urban street dominated by an elevated highway and glowing advertisements. The scene then shifts from the open road and palm trees into a claustrophobic alleyway, where the lighting transitions from broad city glows to intense purple, teal, and red neon signs. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this enclosed corridor, passing a neon-lit bar toward the vivid signage of Prepab City.
